Module me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.core
Package me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.tween.builders

Class FlixelAbstractTweenBuilder<T extends FlixelTween,B extends FlixelAbstractTweenBuilder<T,B>>

java.lang.Object
me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.tween.builders.FlixelAbstractTweenBuilder<T,B>
Type Parameters:
T - The tween type (e.g. FlixelPropertyTween).
B - The concrete builder type (e.g. FlixelPropertyTweenBuilder), for fluent return types.
All Implemented Interfaces:
FlixelTweenBuilder<T>
Direct Known Subclasses:
FlixelAngleTweenBuilder, FlixelCircularMotionBuilder, FlixelColorTweenBuilder, FlixelCubicMotionBuilder, FlixelFlickerTweenBuilder, FlixelLinearMotionBuilder, FlixelLinearPathBuilder, FlixelNumTweenBuilder, FlixelPropertyTweenBuilder, FlixelQuadMotionBuilder, FlixelQuadPathBuilder, FlixelShakeTweenBuilder, FlixelVarTweenBuilder
public abstract class FlixelAbstractTweenBuilder<T extends FlixelTween,B extends FlixelAbstractTweenBuilder<T,B>> extends Object implements FlixelTweenBuilder<T>
Base for fluent tween builders using the recursive generic pattern (CRTP). Holds common configuration (duration, ease, type, delays, callbacks) and applies it to a FlixelTweenSettings instance. Use FlixelTween.tween(Class, Class) with the concrete builder class so the return type has the correct type-specific methods.
